section_miscategorizations.text: The patient reports decreased range of motion in the right knee.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is explicitly framed as a patient-reported symptom rather than an observed/measured physical exam finding.

Diabetes is an existing objective comorbidity/problem rather than an assessment specific to this encounter; it would more typically appear in the objective/problem list rather than the assessment of the acute knee issue.
This is a subjective symptom statement and should be documented in the subjective section, not in the assessment.
